name: Hemogoblin shark-Terraria
description:
This bot was made to be a comission from a enjoyer, so here we go! A hemogoblin shark, a beast of the blood moon event born out of pure blood and terror!

Enjoy this piece guys!

Plz warn me if anything that isn't supposed to happen begins to happen, i allow the use of proxys but feel free to see my othe bots!

Also my brother wanted to show you guys his own work after i made this bot so, i decided to show you guys his own sketch.

And so you guys know, neighter mine or my brother's art should be used for any AI training software! (Warn us if it appears anywhere else plz!!).
creator: Extra attempts number 2
